ocr.text: In Table 1, the categories of lesions include "Pigs with esophageal ulcers," which total 468 with 112 in the <40 kg category, 160
in the 40-60 kg category, and 196 in the >60 kg category; "Pigs without esophageal ulcers," totaling 4572 with 2021 in the <40
kg category, 1440 in the 40-60 kg category, and 1111 in the >60 kg category; and the category totals, which sum to 5040 with
2133 in the <40 kg category, 1600 in the 40-60 kg category, and 1307 in the >60 kg category.

Additionally, "Pigs with glandular region ulcers" total 180, with 32 in the <40 kg category, 56 in the 40-60 kg category, and 92
in the >60 kg category; "Pigs without glandular region ulcers" total 4860, comprising 2101 in the <40 kg category, 1544 in the
40-60 kg category, and 1215 in the >60 kg category; the overall category total remains 5040. In Table 2, peptide sequences
displayed on phage include "41–74" with 12/14 (86%) APS1 patient sera positive and 0/20 (0%) control sera, P value <0.0001,
